name: aurora-multi-select
title: Aurora MultiSelect
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
docs:
Aurora MultiSelect is an Aurora UI component for Claude Design parity surfaces.

Install `aurora-tokens` and `aurora-button` first; the shadcn CLI resolves these automatically through the @aurora registry namespace.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/multi-select.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-button`.
